//: Standalone tsc config to type-check the browser-side JS in public/.
//1: The main tsconfig.json only compiles src/**/*.ts (the server). This
//2: config runs `tsc --noEmit` against public/app.js + public/lib/*.js so
//3: the `// @ts-check` diagnostics surface from the CLI (npm run check:public)
//4: instead of only inside VS Code's language server.
